FacilityProfile.description:
Collection of key/value pairs where keys are existing attributes in the agency profile, defined through
the AlayaCare web application.
On the example below default profile keys for the facility profile are used.
Example profile attributes:
+ `name`: string
+ `city`: string
+ `title`: string
+ `state`: string
+ `contact_type`: string
+ `fax`: string
+ `company`: string
+ `phone_other`: string
+ `phone_main`: string
+ `address`: string
+ `country`: string
+ `zip`: string
+ `address_suite`: string
+ `remarks`: string

timezone.description: Time Zone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones)
Time Zone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones)
Time Zone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones)

message.example: Partial success when locking visits. Visits are not approved or could not be found

visit_ids.description: List of Alayacare external visit IDs

status.description: Status of the visit based on status hierarchy from AlayaCare web application.

alayacare_visit_ids.description: List of Alayacare visit IDs (visit IDs should be listed separated by a coma)

visit_ids.description: List of Alayacare external visit IDs

items.description: Alayacare external visit ID (External visit IDs should be listed separated by a coma).

VisitTimekeeping.description: The state of the verified start and end times

verified_start_time.description: Datetime string referring to the time the first clock in happened, or one manually overwritten

verified_end_time.description: Datetime string referring to the time the last clock out happened, or one manually overwritten

is_verified_start_time_overwritten.description: This is true in case the verified_start_time was overwritten by the user and false if is the default from the work-sessions

is_verified_end_time_overwritten.description: This is true in case the verified_end_time was overwritten by the user and false if is the default from the work-sessions

completed.description: Indicates if the ADL was completed during the visit

reason.description: Reason why the ADL was not completed, in case it wasn't

timezone.description: Time Zone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones)

is_home_address.description: If address defined matches the client address from the client profile, this value is true. Otherwise, the value is false.

status.description: Status of the visit based on status hierarchy from AlayaCare web application.

service_instructions.example: Call in the morning to confirm each visit

BaseVisitUpdate.description: AlayaCare visit entity data for updates

visit_id.description:
External visit ID
Allows correlating the visit in AlayaCare to visit data on an external system.
If not specified AlayaCare visit ID would be used as default value.

employee_id.description:
External employee ID
If no employee is specified a vacant visit will be created.

alayacare_employee_id.description:
AlayaCare employee ID
If no employee is specified a vacant visit will be created.

service_id.description:
External service ID
Can be omitted if the client has a single active service.

alayacare_service_id.description:
AlayaCare service ID
Can be omitted if the client has a single active service.

cancel_code_id.description:
AlayaCare ID of the cancel code.
Value must be `null` if visit is not cancelled.

service_instructions.example: Call in the morning to confirm each visit

VisitCreate.description: AlayaCare visit entity data for creation

FacilityVisitCreate.description: date for creating a facility visit

delivery_date.description: Delivery date for visit in UTC format

intervention_id.description: ID of the intervention configured in the client's careplan

completed.description: Completion of the instance of the intervention in the visit

comment.description: Comment entered in the visit intervention

duration.description: Duration of the intervention in minutes

intervention_id.description: ID of the intervention configured in the client's careplan

completed.description: Completion of the instance of the intervention in the visit

comment.description: Comment entered in the visit intervention. Will return the `not_completed_reason_name` if it is set but there is no comment

not_completed_reason_name.description: Reason code for not completed the visit intervention

status.description: The status of the visit intervention

created_by.description: User who created the intervention in the visit

updated_by.description: User who last updated the intervention in the visit

completions.description: Date-time of completion of the intervention (ISO 8601)

is_required.description: Intervention is required or not to clock out of the visit

module.description: Alayacare Module to which the intervention is attached

status.description: Status of the intervention in the Careplan

type.description: One of the types defined in the setting "Care Documentation > Care Plan Intervention Types"

rrule.description: Recurrence rule applied to the daily activity.

tag.description: Attribute key in the demographics object

description.description: Attribute description as it shows in the web application

PaginatedList.description: Base model of all paginated lists

count.description: Number of items in the response

created_on.description: Creation time of the visit exception

is_midnight_rule_applicable.description: Whether or not the visits associated to this bill code will be split into two billable items in overnight schedules.

EVVVisit_Timekeeping.description: It contains information related to the Visit Timekeeping object associated with the EVV Visit.

first_clock_in_time.description: This field will always have the first clock-in time from the visit work sessions, regardless if it was overwritten or not.

last_clock_out_time.description: This field will always have the last clock-out time from the visit work sessions, regardless if it was overwritten or it's is null.

adjusted_start_time.description: This field contains adjusted start time, if the end time isn't adjusted it will be populated with the first clock-in time, it will only be null if there's no worksession and no adjusted start time.

adjusted_end_time.description: This field contains adjusted end time, if the end time isn't adjusted it will be populated with the last clock-out time, it will only be null if there's no worksession and no adjusted end time.

is_adjusted_start_time.description: It will be true if the start time is adjusted.

is_adjusted_end_time.description: It will be true if the end time is adjusted.

pull_billing_data_from_visit_notes.description: True if is founder fetch the billing information from notes.

is_primary.description: Diagnosis is primary or not primary

timezone.description: Timezone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones). If not set, returns the branch timezone.

updated_by.description: User who last updated the employee

updated_on.description: Datetime of last time the employee was updated

is_billable.description: Cancel Code is billable or not billable

created_by.description: User who created the intervention in the visit

status.description: Status of the visit based on status hierarchy from AlayaCare web application.

timezone.description: Timezone name in IANA format (iana.org/time-zones). If not set, returns the branch timezone.

invoice_line_trn.description: The latest TRN of the invoice line

invoice_line_rate_by_billing_increment.description: invoice line rate by billing increment

claim_update_flow.description: The update flow of the claim, if claim is voided or revised.

client_active_services.description: List of active Client Services linked to the same Sandata payer as the visit
